info.title: DataForSEO API
info.description: DataForSEO API endpoints exposed through the AIsa unified gateway.

get.summary: Get Google Organic SERP Results by id
get.description: Get Google Organic SERP Results by id. Retrieve regular task results for a posted task within 30 days at no extra charge.

version.description: API version

tasks_count.description: Number of tasks returned

tasks_error.description: Number of tasks returned with an error

get.summary: Get Google Organic SERP Advanced Results by id
get.description: Get Google Organic SERP Advanced Results by id. Retrieve advanced task results for a posted task within 30 days at no extra charge.

version.description: API version

tasks_count.description: Number of tasks returned

tasks_error.description: Number of tasks returned with an error

tasks[].result.description: Advanced result array for the task

get.summary: Get Organic SERP Completed Tasks
get.description: Get Organic SERP Completed Tasks. Returns a list of completed standard tasks ready for retrieval.

version.description: API version

tasks_count.description: Number of tasks returned

tasks_error.description: Number of tasks returned with an error

post.description: Live Google Organic SERP HTML. Returns raw HTML immediately. Each Live SERP API call can contain only one task.

version.description: API version

tasks_count.description: Number of tasks returned

tasks_error.description: Number of tasks returned with an error

url.description: Direct URL of the search query

location_name.description: Full name of search engine location

language_name.description: Full name of search engine language

search_param.description: Additional parameters of the search query

get.summary: List of Google AI Mode Languages for SERP
get.description: You will receive the list of languages by calling this API. Your account will not be charged for using this API.

version.description: The current version of the API

tasks_count.description: The number of tasks in the tasks array

tasks_error.description: The number of tasks in the tasks array returned with an error

get.summary: Get Ai Mode SERP Completed Tasks
get.description: Returns the list of completed tasks that have not been collected yet. If postback_url was specified, tasks appear here only when delivery to your server failed. You can make up to 20 API calls per minute and get up to 1000 tasks completed within the previous three days per call.

version.description: The current version of the API

tasks_count.description: The number of tasks in the tasks array

tasks_error.description: The number of tasks in the tasks array returned with an error

tasks[].result_count.description: Number of elements in the result array

tasks[].data.description: Contains the parameters passed in the request URL

tasks[].result[].id.description: Task identifier of the completed task

tasks[].result[].se.description: Search engine specified when setting the task

tasks[].result[].date_posted.description: Date when the task was posted in UTC format

tasks[].result[].endpoint_advanced.description: URL for collecting SERP Advanced results

tasks[].result[].endpoint_html.description: URL for collecting SERP HTML results

get.summary: Get Google Ai Mode HTML Results by id
get.description: Retrieve Google AI Mode HTML results by task id. The task-get HTML endpoint is referenced from the AI Mode catalog and completed-task endpoint list; path placeholder normalized from $id to {id}.

version.description: The current version of the API

tasks_count.description: The number of tasks in the tasks array

tasks_error.description: The number of tasks in the tasks array returned with an error

tasks[].result_count.description: Number of elements in the result array

tasks[].data.description: Contains the same parameters specified in the POST request

post.summary: Live Google Ai Mode SERP HTML
post.description: Returns raw HTML of Google AI Mode SERP results in real time. Each Live SERP API call can contain only one task.

version.description: The current version of the API

tasks_count.description: The number of tasks in the tasks array

tasks_error.description: The number of tasks in the tasks array returned with an error

tasks[].result_count.description: Number of elements in the result array

tasks[].data.description: Contains the same parameters specified in the POST request

tasks[].result[].keyword.description: Keyword received in the POST array

tasks[].result[].type.description: Search engine type in the POST array

tasks[].result[].se_domain.description: Search engine domain in the POST array

tasks[].result[].location_code.description: Location code in the POST array

tasks[].result[].language_code.description: Language code in the POST array

keyword.description: Keyword; you can specify up to 700 characters

location_name.description: Full name of search engine location; required if location_code or location_coordinate is not specified

location_code.description: Search engine location code; required if location_name or location_coordinate is not specified

location_coordinate.description: GPS coordinates of a location; required if location_name or location_code is not specified

language_name.description: Full name of search engine language; required if language_code is not specified

language_code.description: Search engine language code; required if language_name is not specified

get.summary: Get Maps SERP Completed Tasks
get.description: Get Maps SERP Completed Tasks. Returns a list of completed tasks that have not been collected yet. Up to 1000 tasks completed within the previous 3 days can be returned per call.

version.description: The current version of the API

tasks_count.description: The number of tasks in the tasks array

tasks_error.description: The number of tasks in the tasks array returned with an error

tasks[].result[].id.description: Task identifier of the completed task

tasks[].result[].se.description: Search engine specified when setting the task

tasks[].result[].date_posted.description: Date when the task was posted in UTC format

tasks[].result[].endpoint_advanced.description: URL for collecting SERP Advanced results

get.summary: Get Google Maps SERP Advanced Results by id
get.description: Get Google Maps SERP Advanced Results by id. Results can be retrieved by task id within the retention window after posting the task.

version.description: The current version of the API

tasks_count.description: The number of tasks in the tasks array

tasks_error.description: The number of tasks in the tasks array returned with an error

tasks[].result_count.description: Number of elements in the result array

tasks[].data.description: Contains the same parameters specified in the POST request

tasks[].result[].date_posted.description: Date when the task was posted in UTC format

tasks[].result[].endpoint_advanced.description: URL for collecting SERP Advanced results

tasks[].result[].endpoint_html.description: URL for collecting SERP HTML results

get.summary: List of Google Events Locations for SERP API
get.description: List of Google Events Locations for SERP API. Returns the list of supported locations for Google Events SERP. Your account is not charged for using this endpoint.

version.description: The current version of the API

tasks_count.description: The number of tasks in the tasks array

tasks_error.description: The number of tasks in the tasks array returned with an error

post.description: Setting Google Events SERP Tasks. Your account is charged only for setting a task. You can send up to 100 tasks per POST call and retrieve completed results later by task id or via postback/pingback.

version.description: The current version of the API

tasks_count.description: The number of tasks in the tasks array

tasks_error.description: The number of tasks in the tasks array returned with an error

tasks[].result_count.description: Number of elements in the result array

location_name.description: Full name of search engine location

language_name.description: Full name of search engine language

pingback_url.description: Notification URL of a completed task

post.summary: Setting Google Ads Search SERP Tasks
post.description: Setting Google Ads Search SERP Tasks. Returns ads run by advertisers on Google Ads. Historical data is available from 2018-05-31. Your account is charged only for setting a task.

version.description: The current version of the API

tasks_count.description: The number of tasks in the tasks array

tasks_error.description: The number of tasks in the tasks array returned with an error

tasks[].result_count.description: Number of elements in the result array

advertiser_ids.description: Advertiser identifiers; required if target is not specified

target.description: Domain name associated with an advertiser account; required if advertiser_ids is not specified

location_name.description: Full name of search engine location

pingback_url.description: Notification URL of a completed task

postback_data.description: Postback datatype; only advanced is supported
